channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [OLAELEC] Ola Electric Launches #EndICEAge Campaign, Offers Limited-Period Benefits Worth Over ₹20,000
item.description:
Ola Electric has launched the #EndICEAge campaign to accelerate India's transition to electric mobility. The campaign offers limited-period benefits worth over ₹20,000 for customers purchasing a new Ola S1 scooter or Roadster motorcycle. The offer includes a ₹10,000 cash discount and an extended 8-year battery warranty valued at up to ₹15,000. A social initiative has also been introduced where customers can share their transition from petrol to electric and get their petrol expenses adjusted against the payment made by them.

  • Ola Electric launches #EndICEAge campaign to accelerate EV adoption
  • Limited-period benefits worth over ₹20,000 offered
  • Includes ₹10,000 cash discount and extended 8-year battery warranty
  • Social initiative to refund customers’ petrol spend
  • Aimed at encouraging riders to move away from petrol vehicles and adopt electric mobility

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CTLLAB] Jagdish Umakant Nayak Acquires Shares in Clinitech Laboratory Ltd Under SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Jagdish Umakant Nayak, a promoter of Clinitech Laboratory Ltd, has disclosed the acquisition of equity shares under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition took place on the 12th and 13th of March, 2026, with a total of 6,000 shares acquired. This brings his total holding to 7,11,700 shares, representing 31.18% of the company's total voting rights.

  • Jagdish Umakant Nayak, a promoter of Clinitech Laboratory Ltd, has acquired shares under SEBI regulations.
  • The acquisition took place on the 12th and 13th of March, 2026, with a total of 6,000 shares acquired.
  • This brings his total holding to 7,11,700 shares, representing 31.18% of the company's total voting rights.
  • The acquisition was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The shares were acquired from the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited (BSE), where the company's shares are listed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clinitech Laboratory Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SACHEMT] Ankit Satishkumar Shah Acquires Shares in Sacheta Metals Ltd as Per SEBI Regulations
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Ankit Satishkumar Shah. The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of shares in Sacheta Metals Ltd. The total equity share capital of the company remains the same at Rs. 25,00,00,000 divided into 12,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each, both before and after the acquisition. The diluted share/voting capital of the company also remains the same at Rs. 25,00,00,000 divided into 12,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 2/- each after the acquisition.

  • Ankit Satishkumar Shah has acquired shares in Sacheta Metals Ltd as per SEBI regulations.
  • The acquisition does not change the total equity share capital or the diluted share/voting capital of the company.
  • The acquisition was made in accordance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SACHETA METALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [JSL] JSL Overseas Holding Ltd Acquires Shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd from Open Market
item.description:
🔥 Trending

JSL Overseas Holding Ltd, a Mauritius-based company, has purchased equity shares of Jindal Stainless Limited from the open market. The acquisition was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The total shares acquired amounted to 14,01,21,967, which is 16.99% of the total voting rights of Jindal Stainless Limited. The acquisition was made on 11th and 12th March 2026. The equity share capital of Jindal Stainless Limited remains unchanged at Rs. 1648839176/- divided into 824419588 equity shares of Rs.2/- each, both before and after the acquisition.

  • JSL Overseas Holding Ltd has acquired 14,01,21,967 shares of Jindal Stainless Limited, amounting to 16.99% of the total voting rights.
  • The acquisition was made from the open market on 11th and 12th March 2026.
  • The equity share capital of Jindal Stainless Limited remains unchanged at Rs. 1648839176/- divided into 824419588 equity shares of Rs.2/- each.
  • Jindal Stainless Limited is listed on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited and BSE Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL STAINLESS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ARFIN] Arfin India Ltd to Subscribe to Wholly Owned Subsidiary's Rights Issue for ¥4,50,00,000
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Arfin India Ltd announced at their board meeting held on March 14, 2026, their decision to subscribe to the Rights Issue of their Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Arfin Titanium & Speciality Alloys Limited. The Company has approved to subscribe to the Rights Issue for an amount up to ¥4,50,00,000 (Rupees Four Crore and Fifty Lakhs only) or such higher amount as may be required. The subsidiary company is engaged in manufacturing and trading of Non-ferrous metal. The acquisition is not a related party transaction and does not require any governmental or regulatory approvals.

  • Arfin India Ltd to subscribe to the Rights Issue of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary.
  • The subsidiary, Arfin Titanium & Speciality Alloys Limited, is engaged in manufacturing and trading of Non-ferrous metal.
  • The Company has approved to invest an amount up to ¥4,50,00,000 (Rupees Four Crore and Fifty Lakhs only).
  • The acquisition is not a related party transaction.
  • No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arfin India Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [ARFIN] Arfin India Ltd Approves to Subscribe to Rights Issue of Equity Shares in Wholly Owned Subsidiary
item.description:
Arfin India Ltd has approved to subscribe to the Right Issue of equity shares of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Arfin Titanium and Speciality Alloys Limited. The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting held on March 14, 2026. The company plans to subscribe to the Rights Issue for an amount up to ¥4,50,00,000/- (Rupees Four Crore and Fifty Lakhs only) or such higher amount as may be required. Arfin Titanium and Speciality Alloys Limited is engaged in manufacturing and trading of Non-ferrous metal.

  • Arfin India Ltd approves to subscribe to the Right Issue of equity shares of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Arfin Titanium and Speciality Alloys Limited.
  • The subscription amount is up to ¥4,50,00,000/- (Rupees Four Crore and Fifty Lakhs only) or such higher amount as may be required.
  • Arfin Titanium and Speciality Alloys Limited is engaged in manufacturing and trading of Non-ferrous metal.
  • The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting held on March 14, 2026.
  • Arfin Titanium and Speciality Alloys Limited is a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Arfin India Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arfin India Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation of India Ltd Receives Order Worth INR 34,29,13,023 from South Central Railway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has received a Letter of Acceptance (LoA) from Dy.Cste/Projects/Bza. 2 for Signaling & Telecom arrangements in connection with yard remodeling of Guntur Junction and Automatic Block Signaling System between GNT-NLPD Section in Guntur Division of South Central Railway. The estimated size of the order is INR 34,29,13,023 including tax.

  • Order received from South Central Railway for Signaling & Telecom arrangements.
  • The estimated size of the order is INR 34,29,13,023 including tax.
  • The order is for yard remodeling of Guntur Junction and Automatic Block Signaling System between GNT-NLPD Section.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation of India Ltd Receives Order Worth INR 29,90,01,641 from Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment And Promotion Board
item.description:
🔥 Trending

RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has announced that it has received a Work Order from the Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment And Promotion Board. The order, worth INR 29,90,01,641 (including tax), is for providing security-related ancillary services during recruitment examinations. The order was received on 13th March 2026 and is to be executed domestically.

  • Order received from Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment And Promotion Board
  • Value of the order is INR 29,90,01,641 (including tax)
  • Services to be provided include security-related ancillary services during recruitment examinations
  • Order to be executed domestically
  • Order received on 13th March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: New Order Received

item.title: [IFINSEC] Ganga Devi Bansal Releases Pledge of Equity Shares in India Finsec Ltd
item.description:
Ganga Devi Bansal has released a pledge of equity shares in India Finsec Ltd as per the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011. The disclosure was made on March 13, 2026, in the prescribed format. The release of pledge involves a significant number of shares, but the exact number is not specified in the text.

  • Ganga Devi Bansal releases pledge of equity shares in India Finsec Ltd
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 2011
  • Release of pledge involves a significant number of shares
  • No exact number of shares specified in the text
  • Disclosure made on March 13, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA FINSEC LTD. | Category: Pledge

item.title: [IFINSEC] Gopal Bansal HUF Releases Pledge of Equity Shares in India Finsec Ltd
item.description:
Gopal Bansal HUF has released a pledge of equity shares in India Finsec Ltd. The disclosure was made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 on March 13, 2026. The release of pledge details are provided in the prescribed format.

  • Gopal Bansal HUF releases pledge of equity shares in India Finsec Ltd
  • Disclosure made under Regulation 31(1) and 31(2) of SEBI regulations
  • Release of pledge details provided in prescribed format
  • Event dated March 13, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA FINSEC LTD. | Category: Pledge
